title: Smoke-Infused Courgette Melanzane
description: A savory and chewy Croatian dish featuring smoked courgettes with a touch of sourness to satisfy midnight cravings, suitable for kosher diets.
instructions: Slice the courgettes into rounds about 0.5 cm thick.
Season both sides of each slice with salt and pepper to taste.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the courgette slices, ensuring they don’t touch each other to prevent sticking.
Sprinkle smoked paprika on top of each side for extra smoky flavor.
Cook until the edges start to brown and the insides become tender but not mushy (about 5-7 minutes per side).
In a mixing bowl, combine sour cream with a pinch of salt. Mix well.
Serve the smoked courgettes alongside the sour cream dip for dipping.
Optional: For a more intense smoky flavor, place the pan in a preheated oven at 200°C (392°F) for an additional minute or until desired smoke level is achieved.
